resolved_across_rounds: F1 param/shadow false MUST (stamp-based resolution) — VERIFIED FIXED
F2 name-based main-schema CTE breaks cross-module closure (id-based CTE) — VERIFIED FIXED
F3 function-typed value marked MUST (is_function_rhs gating) — VERIFIED FIXED
F4 contract stamped on empty index (guard + unreachable refuse) — VERIFIED FIXED
HOF-callback false UNREACHABLE for List.map island (callback-escape MAY_ENUMERATED/MAY_TOP) — VERIFIED FIXED

cross_runtime_findings.summary: Computed function-typed argument (List.map (make ()) xs) is dropped instead of MAY_TOP → false UNREACHABLE.
cross_runtime_findings.evidence: computed_callback edges only List.map MUST + make MUST, no MAY_TOP; unreachable computed_callback island = UNREACHABLE (false).
cross_runtime_findings.fix: add_arg_escapes wildcard for arrow-typed args must emit MAY_TOP (or MAY_ENUMERATED if resolvable).

cross_runtime_findings.summary: Calls through a first-class module PARAMETER (M.run where M is a (module M:S) param) classified MUST external leaf, not MAY_TOP → false UNREACHABLE.
cross_runtime_findings.evidence: first_class_param -> M.run kind MUST; unreachable first_class_param island = UNREACHABLE though caller-supplied M.run may call island.
cross_runtime_findings.fix: Detect qualified calls whose module-path root is a local/first-class module parameter; emit MAY_TOP.

cross_runtime_findings.summary: Walker descends into nested function/lambda bodies and attributes their calls as MUST on the enclosing top-level function → FALSE MUST paths (breaks reaches ground truth).
cross_runtime_findings.evidence: let unused_local_closure = let local y = island y in ignore local → edge unused_local_closure -> island MUST; reaches unused_local_closure island = PATH EXISTS though local is never invoked. Pre-existing flatten-everything traversal, exposed by MUST labeling.
cross_runtime_findings.fix: Do not recurse into Texp_function bodies as part of the enclosing caller's MUST calls; model nested functions/lambdas as deferred bodies linked only when invoked/passed (MAY_ENUMERATED/MAY_TOP). CORE WALKER REDESIGN — blast radius: LSP path + effects extractor share this traversal.

notes: 3 codex rounds. F1-F4 + HOF-callback all fixed & regression-tested. Findings 1-2 tractable. Finding 3 is the crux: TRUE MUST-soundness for OCaml higher-order/nested/first-class-module code requires redesigning the shared CMT walker traversal (deferred nested bodies / CFA), a substantial project with tool-wide blast radius. Escalating: the soundness bar / investment is the maintainer's call.
